mapper.update: update orders set status = #{status}, paying_at = #{payingAt}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'INIT'
update orders set status = 'PAYING' where status in ('INIT', 'PAY_FAILED') and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'DEDUCTING' where status = 'PAY_SUCCESS' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'DEDUCT_SUCCESS' where status in ('PAY_SUCCESS','DEDUCT_FAIL') and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'DEDUCT_FAIL' where status = 'PAY_SUCCESS' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'REFUNDING' where status = 'DEDUCT_FAIL' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'REFUND_SUCCESS' where status in ('DEDUCT_FAIL', 'REFUND_FAILED')and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'REFUND_FAILED' where status = 'DEDUCT_FAIL' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'PAYING'
update orders set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into orders( order_id, user_id, sku_id, qty, status, create_time, update_time) values( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{skuId}, #{qty}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'CANCEL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and status in ('INIT', 'PAY_FAILED')
UPDATE orders SET status = 'CONFIRM', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'INIT'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'PAY_FAILED', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'INIT'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'PAY_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and status in ('INIT','PAY_FAILED')
UPDATE orders SET status = 'ROLLBACK', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'INIT'
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE status IN ('INIT','PAYING') AND ( (status = 'INIT' AND create_time < NOW() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) OR (status = 'PAYING' AND paying_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) ) ORDER BY create_time LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'PAID', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAYING'
